args:
set -eu
measure_dir=$(mktemp -d)
if cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- measure decode-path --out "$measure_dir" >"$measure_dir/stdout.txt" 2>"$measure_dir/stderr.txt"; then
  echo 'decode-path measure unexpectedly succeeded' >&2
  exit 1
fi
grep -q 'compile-region:decode_attention' "$measure_dir/stderr.txt"
grep -q 'Full worker startup context' "$measure_dir/stderr.txt"
printf 'measure-decode-fail-closed\n'
